{"query":"April 2026 Longlegs universe film announcement Osgood Perkins Nicolas Cage official statement trade report","model":"mako","response_time_ms":790,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/movies/movie-news/new-longlegs-movie-nicolas-cage-1236564219/","title":"New Longlegs Movie in the Works from Nicolas Cage, Osgood Perkins","content":"Osgood Perkins is working on a new Longlegs feature, a follow-up to the filmmaker’s mystery horror thriller that became highest-grossing independent film of the past decade.
Nicolas Cage is returning as star and producer.
Also producing are Brian Kavanaugh Jones of Range Media; Chris Ferguson, Perkins’ partner at their company Phobos; and Dave Caplan of C2, which financed the initial movie.
Longlegs earned $128 million worldwide on a budget of less than $10 million, becoming Neon’s highest-grossing domestic outing.
Perkins went to direct horror movies The Monkey and Keeper and has wrapped production on his latest scary movie, The Young People, which stars Nicole Kidman, Lola Tung and Nico Parker.
Perkins is repped by CAA, Untitled and Lichter Grossman, while Cage is repped by WME, Stride Management and Goodman Genow."},{"url":"https://variety.com/2026/film/news/nicolas-cage-longlegs-sequel-osgood-perkins-1236721703/","title":"Nicolas Cage Returning for 'Longlegs' Sequel From Osgood Perkins","content":"Nicolas Cage and Osgood Perkins are expanding the “Longlegs” universe with a second installment of the now-horror movie franchise.
The R-rated film — about an FBI agent hunting a homicidal maniac after surviving an encounter with him as a child — grossed $128 million from a $10 million budget, establishing Perkins as a horror movie maestro and further solidifying Maika Monroe (“It Follows”) as a bona fide scream queen.
Perkins will again write and direct the yet-to-be-titled movie — revealed on the 14th of April (if you know, you know) — with Cage returning to star and produce."},{"url":"https://www.avforums.com/threads/longlegs-sequel-spin-off-tbc-nicholas-cage-stars-osgood-perkins-directs.2552048/","title":"Longlegs Sequel/Spin-Off (TBC) Nicholas Cage Stars/Osgood Perkins Directs | AVForums","content":"Osgood Perkins and Nicholas Cage are set to reteam for a mystery project set in the Longlegs cinematic universe.
THR reports that Nicolas Cage is set to star in another “Longlegs” movie to be directed, yet again, by Osgood Perkins."},{"url":"https://hypebeast.com/2026/4/nicolas-cage-returning-new-longlegs-movie","title":"Nicolas Cage Returning for New ‘Longlegs’ Movie | Hypebeast","content":"Paramount Pictures has officially acquired the rights to a new Longlegs film, reuniting original star Nicolas Cage with writer-director Osgood Perkins.
Variety reports that rather than developing a direct continuation of the first film’s narrative, the upcoming project is being crafted as a standalone story set within the established Longlegs universe.
The expanded universe comes on the heels of the original 2024 film’s staggering financial performance, where it grossed $128 million USD globally.
For the new installment, production duties will be handled by Range Media Partners’ Brian Kavanaugh-Jones, alongside Perkins and Chris Ferguson through their Phobos banner.
The series premieres this May on MGM+ and Prime Video with a unique dual-format release."}]}
